StudBud

Introduction

    Pomodoro

  • A time management system that encourages people to work with the time they have and have and adjustable breaks and sessions.
  • Help complete tasks without distractions, improves productivity and time management.

    • Stopwatch

  • A digital display that can be started and stopped at will for exact timing.

    • Covey Quadrants

  • A framework for prioritizing your time and tasks for optimized efficiency and productivity
  • Urgency: Tasks and responsibilities requiring immediate action or attention.
  • Importance: Those with high significance or value to goals.

    • Dictionary

  • Easy access dictionary

    • Music Player

  • Plays CAFE MUSIC ~STUDIO GHIBLI Jazz & Bossa~ to help study and not get distract with other heavy music.
  • Pomodoro
  • Stop Watch

25 min
